items.title: Planned US-funded baby vaccine trial in Guinea-Bissau blasted by WHO
items.dek: Giving some newborns in Guinea-Bissau an established hepatitis B treatment but not others is "unethical", it says.
items.body: Giving some newborns in Guinea-Bissau an established hepatitis B treatment but not others is "unethical", it says.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Russia killed opposition leader Alexei Navalny using dart frog toxin, UK says
items.dek: There is no innocent explanation for the toxin being found in samples taken from Navalny's body, Foreign Office says.
items.body: There is no innocent explanation for the toxin being found in samples taken from Navalny's body, Foreign Office says.
items.author: IriLine Desk
